title: Incidents
subtitle: Manage public incidents and notify status subscribers.

noIncidents.title: No incidents
noIncidents.description: All systems are operational. Create an incident to notify subscribers.

form.createDescription: Creating an incident will immediately notify all subscribers by email.
form.editDescription: Update the incident details. Subscribers will not be re-notified.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What is happening and what is the impact on users?
form.error: Failed to save incident. Please try again.

delete.confirm: Delete this incident? This action cannot be undone.
